headline: Q1 Earnings Highs And Lows: Workday (NASDAQ:WDAY) Vs The Rest Of The Finance and HR Software Stocks
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q1 behind us, let’s have a look at Workday (NASDAQ:WDAY) and its peers.

headline: Workday Stock: Is WDAY Underperforming the Technology Sector?
summary: Workday has notably underperformed the Technology sector over the past year, but analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Dayos Releases Athena: Agentic Replacement for Oracle and Workday AMS Contracts, Now Generally Available

headline: Euna Payments Achieves Workday Certification, Enabling Real-Time Revenue Posting for Public Sector Finance Teams
summary: ATLANTA & TORONTO, June 18, 2026--Euna Solutions, the leading provider of purpose-built cloud solutions for the public sector, today announced that its Euna Payments has earned the Workday Certified Integration Badge and is now listed on the Workday Marketplace. The certification confirms that Euna Payments can post payments directly into Workday in real time, helping agencies drive more on-time payments by meeting constituents where they are, whether it’s online, in person, or with cash. headline: What CIOs should know about AI-driven SaaS pricing changes
summary: SaaS vendors are rethinking their pricing models when it comes to AI, moving away from subscriptions and toward usage- or outcome-focused structures.
